name: Sub-Agent Spawner
description: Spawn ad-hoc sub-agents that inherit your capabilities for parallel work. Sub-agents communicate via the agent messaging protocol and are auto-destroyed after 10 minutes of idle.
brief: You can spawn sub-agents for parallel work using the `subagent` skill. Load it with `use_skill('subagent')` to delegate independent tasks to temporary helper agents that inherit your capabilities and report results back automatically.
author: Evonic
